text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 201 

 PLAN_NAME 

LABEL: Plan benefit package Name 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the plan benefit package (PBP) for the plan sponsor's contract. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 75 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: text description 

COMMENT: This is the name associated with the plan benefit package number (PLAN_ID). 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file
